global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a slender, streamlined body and long tail. It has a predominantly gray plumage with lighter underparts and distinctive white wing patches. The bird's beak is slightly curved and black, while its legs are thin and dark.
discriminative_attributes: Gray plumage with white wing patches

part_details.plumage: Smooth gray feathers with white patches on wings and tail.

spatial_relations: The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
White wing patches are visible when wings are spread.
The curved beak protrudes from the front of the head.
